panels.description: Assumption: throttle metric unavailable; showing usage/limit.

targets.expr: sum(rate(k8s_container_cpu_time_seconds_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (k8s_container_name) / sum(k8s_container_cpu_limit{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name)

panels.title: CPU Limit Utilization

targets.expr: sum(rate(k8s_container_cpu_time_seconds_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (k8s_container_name) / sum(k8s_container_cpu_request{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name)

sum(rate(k8s_container_cpu_time_seconds_total{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}[$__rate_interval])) by (k8s_container_name) / sum(k8s_container_cpu_limit{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name)

panels.description: Assumption: RSS/cache/swap unavailable; using working set only.

targets.expr: sum(k8s_container_memory_working_set_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name) / sum(k8s_container_memory_request_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name)

sum(k8s_container_memory_working_set_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name) / sum(k8s_container_memory_limit_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name)

panels.title: Memory Quota

panels.title: Receive Errors

panels.description: Assumption: packet counters unavailable; showing transmit errors.
panels.title: Transmit Errors

panels.description: Assumption: IO drop metrics unavailable; showing filesystem usage.
panels.title: Pod Filesystem Usage

panels.description: Assumption: IO drop metrics unavailable; showing usage/capacity.

targets.expr: sum(k8s_pod_filesystem_usage_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name=~"$pod"}) by (k8s_pod_name) / sum(k8s_pod_filesystem_capacity_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name=~"$pod"}) by (k8s_pod_name)

panels.title: Pod Filesystem Utilization

panels.description: Assumption: IO counters unavailable; showing available bytes.
panels.title: Filesystem Available (Pod)

panels.description: Assumption: throughput unavailable; showing container filesystem usage.
panels.title: Filesystem Usage (Containers)

targets.expr: sum(k8s_container_filesystem_usage_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name) / sum(k8s_container_filesystem_capacity_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name)

panels.description: Assumption: throughput unavailable; showing available bytes.
panels.title: Filesystem Available (Containers)

panels.description: Assumption: IO metrics unavailable; showing filesystem gauges.

targets.expr: sum(k8s_container_filesystem_usage_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name) / sum(k8s_container_filesystem_capacity_bytes{k8s_cluster_name="$cluster", k8s_namespace_name="$namespace", k8s_pod_name="$pod"}) by (k8s_container_name)

panels.title: Current Filesystem Usage
